acceptedAnswer.text: Franchise Ki (FKI) is an AI-powered franchise consulting firm that matches qualified buyers with vetted franchise opportunities. We use proprietary AI scoring to surface the right brands for your goals, capital, and lifestyle in minutes — not weeks.

mainEntity.name: How is Franchise Ki different from a traditional franchise broker?

acceptedAnswer.text: Traditional brokers earn commission only from a narrow brand portfolio, creating bias. Franchise Ki uses AI to analyze 800+ franchise brands across all industries, producing unbiased matches based on your actual financial profile and personal goals. Our consulting is free to buyers — funded by transparent placement fees from franchisors.

mainEntity.name: Is Franchise Ki free for franchise buyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. There is no cost to franchise buyers. Franchise Ki is compensated by franchisors only when a successful match is made — and our AI ensures matches are transparent, not commission-driven.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to find a franchise through Franchise Ki?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most buyers receive their initial AI-generated franchise shortlist within 24 hours. From first conversation to franchise selection typically takes 30 to 90 days, depending on due diligence pace and discovery day scheduling.

mainEntity.name: What franchise brands does Franchise Ki work with?

acceptedAnswer.text: Franchise Ki works with 800+ vetted franchise brands across home services, food, fitness, automotive, education, senior care, and emerging categories. Our AI continuously evaluates brand performance, FDD red flags, and franchisee satisfaction to maintain quality.
